name: Chocolate Eclair Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 SMALL PACKAGES FRENCH VANILLA INSTANT PUDDING
3 CUPS MILK AND 3 TABLESPOONS MILK (FOR TOPPING)
1 TEASPOON VANILLA OR PEPPERMINT EXTRACT (FOR MINT FLAVOR)
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX PUDDING WITH 3 CUPS OF MILK TOGETHER.
2. FOLD IN COOL WHIP. SET ASIDE.
3. LAYER THE CRACKERS INTO A 13 X 9 PAN.
4. TOP CRACKERS WITH HALF OF THE PUDDING MIXTURE.
5. LAYER WITH MORE CRACKERS AND PUDDING MIXTURE, ENDING WITH CRACKERS.
6. TOPPING: MELT CHOCOLATE SQUARES IN A BOWL.
7. MIX MELTED CHOCOLATE WITH CORNSYRUP, 3 TABLESPOONS MILK, VANILLA, BUTTER, AND SUGAR.
8. ADD MORE SUGAR IF NEEDED. SPREAD ON TOP OF CRACKERS.
9. REFRIGERATE CAKE FOR SEVERAL HOURS.
